title: Suggested Notes App folders for drop-in archiving:
content:
Suggested Notes App folders for drop-in archiving:

/GPT_ARCHIVE_CORE/
├── PROJECT_MODULES/
│ ├── GR1ND3R/
│ │ ├── PRJ_GR1ND3R.V1.md
│ │ └── GR1ND3R_ARG_ENGINE.md
│ └── MET4/
│ ├── PRJ_MET4_CORE.md
│ └── MET4_TIMELINE_MAP.md
├── ARTIST_IDS/
│ ├── 4_bl00m_PROFILE.md
│ └── ETCETER4_PROFILE.md
├── OUTPUT_LOGIC/
│ └── LOGIC_MODE_TAGS.md



⸻

V. | NEXT ACTION ITEMS
• Confirm preferred copy/paste structure for iOS Notes
• Begin batch generation of module files (1 per project or artist ID)
• Output ZIP folder for mobile storage or iCloud sync
• Optional: Notion database mirror with tags + links
